tea.name: Johar Authentic Flavoured Tea
tea.description: Hand-picked from the finest gardens, our authentic flavoured tea brings you the perfect blend of tradition and taste. Enjoy the robust aroma and refreshing experience with every sip.

jaggery-masala.name: Jaggery Masala
jaggery-masala.description: A traditional blend of organic jaggery and rich Indian spices. Perfect to naturally sweeten your beverages while adding a warm, aromatic spice note that boosts immunity.

cold-coffee.name: Cold Coffee Premium Blend
cold-coffee.description: Experience the chilling delight of our premium cold coffee blend. Made with 100% natural coffee beans, it's the perfect companion for a hot summer day.

jaggery-coffee.name: Jaggery Coffee
jaggery-coffee.description: The perfect marriage of robust coffee beans and pure sugarcane jaggery. A healthier alternative that doesn't compromise on the authentic coffee experience.
